package rulecoverage

func NegativeMultipleErrorEnvelopeShapesSameApiModule() string {
    ruleID := "multiple_error_envelope_shapes_same_api_module"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Endpoints in the same API surface that serialize unrelated error payload structures."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
